name: Baked Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: Potatoes (4 1/2 pounds), peeled and cut into 3/4-inch chunks
Olive oil or vegetable oil (1/4 cup)
Italian salad dressing (2 servings, .7 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with oil and salad dressing mix.
2. Place potato mixture in 2 greased 13x9 pans.
3. Bake uncovered at 400°F for 45 minutes or until tender.
4. Cool completely.
5. Transfer potato mixture to a large bowl; add peppers, onions, tomatoes, eggs, and bacon.
6. Toss gently.
7. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients (mayonnaise, vinegar, lemon juice, dried basil, salt, pepper, garlic powder) and mix well.
8. Pour dressing over salad and stir gently.
9. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
